rows.label: qev056501_MSG0001
rows.name:
People keep telling me lately that I seem like a different person.
They say I've become quite the hard worker and shown real responsibility.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0002
rows.name:
This Biahno Water Purification Plant was attacked by
the native creature Impreca before...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0003
rows.name:
So, no one wants to become the manager
of such a dangerous place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0004
rows.name:
But I volunteered to be the manager here.
It's an important job, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask for details about the situation
at the Biahno Water Purification Plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_JNK0020
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask why she volunteered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0005
rows.name:
Thanks to the Biahno Water Purification Plant's functionality,
we've been successfully producing water with high mineral content.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0006
rows.name: We have the Guard Machines the Orpheans built for us, so I feel safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0007
rows.name:
...But lately, I've been a little worried because the machines
seem to be acting up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0008
rows.name:
They suddenly stop,
or start moving out of nowhere.
They act weirdly sometimes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hmm, I guess it's a way of making amends... or rather,
because I learned how painful it is to envy others...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0010
rows.name:
That's why I wanted to be of use to others.
The work here is incredibly important.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Thanks to the Biahno Water Purification Plant's functionality,
we can produce water with high mineral content,
so this is a very vital facility, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0012
rows.name: We have the Guard Machines the Orpheans built for us, so I feel safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0013
rows.name:
...But lately, I've been a little worried because the machines
seem to be acting up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0014
rows.name:
They suddenly stop,
or start moving out of nowhere.
They act weirdly sometimes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0015
rows.name:
The Guard Machines were developed by the Orphean Tan'osarag, right?
You helped out with that too, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0016
rows.name:
If you don't mind, could you head to NLA and bring
Tan'osarag here?
I think it'd be best to have him inspect them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0017
rows.name:
Thank you.
I'll keep working until Tan'osarag gets here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0018
rows.name:
We have to make lots of good water.
For the sake of our friends who passed away...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056501_MSG0019
rows.name:
Bring Tan'osarag from NLA.
I'm sure he's in his usual spot.[ST:wait ]
